name: semgrep per-rule options provided in the single config project to native CLI flags
command: f=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/emit-tool-config.sh" --tool semgrep --options '{"severity":"ERROR","exclude":["vendor","node_modules"]}' --out . 2>/dev/null); printf '%s' "$f" | grep -q -- '--severity ERROR' && printf '%s' "$f" | grep -q -- '--exclude vendor' && printf '%s' "$f" | grep -q -- '--exclude node_modules' && echo semgrep-projects 1>&2
